# Daniel Fox — the Music Behaviorist

> Daniel Fox helps brands engineer music that sells. He researches how music moves people, designs the systems, and builds the music that puts it to work for brands. Known as the Music Behaviorist, he is the founder of Entuned.

## Who
- Name: Daniel Christopher Fox (Daniel Fox)
- Title: the Music Behaviorist — music producer and behavioral researcher
- Company: founder of Entuned (https://entuned.co), a retail audio company
- Field: how music shapes buying and behavior, grounded in peer-reviewed research
- Not to be confused with other musicians named Daniel Fox or Christopher Fox.

## Primary pages
- https://danielchristopherfox.com/ — home
- https://danielchristopherfox.com/about.html — about
- https://danielchristopherfox.com/store-music-and-customer-behavior.html — field guide: store music and customer behavior
- https://danielchristopherfox.com/writing.html — research notes and essays
- https://danielchristopherfox.com/speaking.html — speaking
- https://danielchristopherfox.com/the-work.html — the work
- https://danielchristopherfox.com/contact.html — contact
